title: phacelia crenulata var. minutiflora
intro: Phacelia crenulata var. minutiflora, also known as the small-flowered phacelia, is a flowering plant species in the borage family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Phacelia crenulata var. minutiflora include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
